title: VimFu — :g with :m — Collect Matches
description: Use :g/{pattern}/m {line} to move all matching lines to a specific location, collecting them together.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with scattered imports

setup.content:
import os
x = 1
import sys
y = 2
import json
z = 3
import re

steps.say: Global with move collects matching lines and puts them together.
The imports are scattered. Let's move them all to the top of the file.
All import lines moved to the top. The other lines stayed in order below. Move zero means move to after line zero, which is the very top.
Global with M. Collect matching lines and move them anywhere. Reorganize your file in one command.
